notifications.title: DocFlow v1.2.2 — Citations Now Visible In-App
notifications.body: Every calculator result now shows its primary reference — WHO, ACC, KDIGO, NICE, and other authoritative guidelines. 175 evidence-based calculators across 15 specialties.

notifications.title: In-Place Updates Now Working
notifications.body: From v1.2.2 onwards, all updates install in-place — no uninstall, no data loss. Just open the app and tap Settings → Check for Updates.
